g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does DevTrails monitor rainfall for disruption triggers?')
sendPrompt('How does temperature monitoring work in DevTrails?')
sendPrompt('How are storm and flood alerts monitored in DevTrails?')
sendPrompt('How is the disruption score computed per zone?')
sendPrompt('What factors go into the zone risk score calculation?')
sendPrompt('How do seasonal adjustments affect the risk score?')
sendPrompt('How do risk tiers map to premium amounts?')
sendPrompt('How does the risk model get retrained?')
sendPrompt('What happens once a disruption trigger fires?')
sendPrompt('How are weekly premium tiers assigned to riders?')
sendPrompt('What does the payout processing system do?')
